---
title: "Control System Project"
---

::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
## Robust Stability and Performance of a small quad-rotor UAV
If the PDF does not display correctly below, you can [download it directly here](assets/ACS_presentation.pdf).
:::

<iframe src="assets/ACS_Presentation.pdf" width="100%" height="800px">
</iframe>
